name: Little Buddy
short_description: Little Buddy is a casual pet simulation where you care for a virtual companion. Feed, play, and interact with Buddy while they wander around your screen. Designed to be played alongside other activities, it’s the perfect idle game to keep your little friend happy and healthy.
detailed_description:
Little Buddy is a relaxing, idle pet care game where you take care of your little companion. Keep your Buddy happy by feeding, playing, and making sure Buddy gets plenty of rest. Your goal is to keep Buddy alive and healthy for as long as you can, but the pace is entirely up to you!

Designed with simplicity in mind, Little Buddy offers fun, lighthearted activities like fetch and whack-a-mole, along with growing food to ensure Buddy’s well-being. It's easy to pick up and play without overwhelming you with tasks or time limits.

This game is perfect for those who want a companion on the side while multitasking or relaxing with other activities. Whether you're at your desk or taking a break, Buddy will be there waiting for some attention!
